betterquesting:10.desc:8:
A beautiful, and yet scary truth of learning the True Tongue.
Knowing that there is much to be done outside of my mission.
It is one thing to be aware of an injustice that can be righted, but it is another to know that I could right a wrong, if I were to neglect my current mission.
Knowledge is power, but it can also be a prison. The more you know, the higher the chance of this knowledge pulling your actions into multiple directions, and diminishing your effectiveness.
Yes, this is a truth even Fractallites have to face. I do not have the energy to help the Twilight Forest and Arcana right now. and yet I want to.
I guess that is another situation to challenge a Fractallite's Mission. The realization that this mission will not right all wrongs. That bearing the load, and gritting my teeth, may not help people that desperately need it...
As I rationalize this, I do see its beauty; even as an Ascended, I cannot do everything, I am still human. And yet, my heart still struggless.
